fonts.usage: Display headings (h1, h2), stat numbers, scroll card titles, wordmark
All body text, UI elements, navigation, tags, CTAs, chatbot

tone.target_audience: Albanian businesses seeking digital transformation, public sector, financial services, logistics companies
sample_copy: Skyline DevHub is a development company engineering the digital future of Albanian business — AI-native and automation-first from the ground up.
We are a development company, not a software vendor. We don't sell features or functionality — we engineer complete solutions.
While others retrofit AI onto legacy workflows, we build automation-first systems from the ground up — delivering efficiency that compounds.
Each engagement is scoped to the outcome, not the feature list. We deliver what works — nothing more, nothing less.
The best solutions disappear into the workflow.

value_propositions: AI-native development from the ground up, not retrofitted onto legacy workflows
Proprietary product suite paired with dedicated development services
Automation-first systems delivering compounding operational efficiency
Complete solutions scoped to outcomes, not feature lists
Digital transformation strategy and advisory for Albanian businesses
key_messages: Solutions, not software — outcomes over feature lists
AI-native and automation-first from the ground up
Maximally efficient solutions through products and services

pages.purpose: Company positioning — development company vs. software vendor, AI-native philosophy

pages.purpose: Service offerings: Product Suite, Custom Development, Integration, Advisory

features.name: Product Suite
features.description: Proprietary AI-native tools for business automation

features.name: Custom Development
features.description: Tailored business systems built AI-native from the ground up

features.name: Integration
features.description: Automation and workflow design connecting existing systems

case_studies.result: Full digitization of citizen services. AI-driven document processing reduced handling times by 94%. Zero-paper operations within six months.
Automated compliance monitoring and transaction processing. End-to-end integration with national banking infrastructure. Manual review eliminated.
AI-native fleet management and route optimization across the Western Balkans corridor. Operational costs reduced 31%. Delivery accuracy above 99.7%.

components.name: SkylineEngine
components.note: WebGL shader engine with scroll-driven animation, pagination state machine, HUD, and theme toggle. Entirely imperative — renders null.

components.name: ChatBot
components.note: AI-powered chatbot with two flows (project brief, inquiry) using Vercel AI SDK and Gemini backend

design_system.color_philosophy: Monotone grayscale only — no chromatic color anywhere in CSS or shader. Accent is white (dark theme) or near-black (light theme).
design_system.theme_mechanism: data-theme attribute on <html> toggles CSS variables; WebGL uBg uniform synced separately

typography_system.display: Bebas Neue 400 — uppercase, line-height 0.92, clamp-based responsive sizing
typography_system.body: DM Mono 300/400 — uppercase for UI, normal case for body-text, wide letter-spacing (0.08em–0.25em), sizes 0.55rem–0.78rem

layout.page_split: 50/50 split-screen — frosted glass content pane on one half, WebGL shape centered on the other

visual_effects: WebGL raymarched SDF shapes (5 scenes: sphere, torus, box, octahedron, double-torus)
Scroll-driven shape morphing with velocity-damped easing
Frosted glass (backdrop-filter: blur 12px) on content panes
Staggered reveal animations on page open
Procedural shader textures: noise bands, edge pulse, brushed specular

i18n.mechanism: next-intl-style async dictionary loader, middleware redirects based on Accept-Language
